claims.summary: A binary non-artifact predicate can treat a 99-percent artifact fragment plus one word as substantive.
claims.disposition: Verified cleanup diagnostics expose removed fraction and remainder texture, including sparse and structure-only review states, without silently equating one token with semantic sufficiency.

claims.summary: Nested or nonstandard quotes may make artifact placement accounting inaccurate.
claims.disposition: Verified nested quote accounting and bounded matching-pair tests; unsupported variants remain visible as contextual rather than silently removed.

claims.summary: Artifact/content mixture should have a density score rather than only a boolean.
claims.disposition: Verified ArtifactRemainderTextureV1 supplies an evidence-only density/structure profile while preserving the existing safety gate.

claims.summary: High entropy should lower the deep-budget threshold or otherwise override token tiers.
claims.disposition: Preserved as Tier 5 because spectral-aware live budgeting changes model behavior and requires explicit operator authorization.
